brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (Yes) with valid reasoning about sustainable yield threshold; goes one level beyond surface by explaining the collapse mechanism but does not trace second-order compounding dynamics or time-value tradeoffs; proceeds linearly with no reflection on assumptions or potential reasoning biases; no counterfactual checks, boundary tests, or re-derivation from a different angle; uses approximate notation (~) appropriately but presents conclusions without structured uncertainty analysis or distinguishing stated facts from model assumptions; considers only the framing provided in the question with no alternative interpretations or edge cases explored; shows the sustainable yield threshold derivation (5% × 800 = 40) but does not show how the cumulative harvest totals or forest trajectory were computed step by step
